description: Vio.com is a hotel metasearch and booking platform operated by FindHotel B.V. It aggregates hotel offers from multiple providers so users and partners can search, compare prices, and send travelers into booking flows.
summary: Vio.com exposes a credentialed REST Partners API at `https://partners.api.vio.com/v1` and a public streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.vio.com/mcp` with optional partner API-key support for higher quota.
